fixtures.name: opaque-loop.rma
fixtures.coverage: Two-frame opaque body loop with one generated static fallback.

fixtures.name: opaque-path.rma
fixtures.coverage: Initial one-shot, two body loops, locked bridge, pointer binding, and two generated static fallbacks.
